title: The Pittsburgh Businesses Actually Showing Up On Their Own Feed
subtitle: The minority that are posting, ranked by Instagram momentum
angle: most Pittsburgh small businesses on this index are dormant on Instagram. These are the ones that aren't, ranked by 30-day cadence and engagement.
intro:
Most Pittsburgh small businesses indexed this quarter have gone quiet on Instagram. Not deleted, not pivoting to another platform, just quiet. The ones on this list are the exception: ten businesses still posting with enough regularity to generate measurable momentum, ranked by 30-day cadence and engagement rate.

A few signals stand out. Hidden Harbor holds the top spot among Pittsburgh bars and has the visual catalog to justify it, yet no TikTok creator has filmed the place yet, which is either an oversight or an opportunity depending on how quickly that changes. Delanie's Coffee in Shadyside sits seventy-fifth among Pittsburgh cafes by most metrics, but seven separate creators have already filmed it this quarter with no TikTok account to funnel that attention anywhere. That gap between earned attention and owned presence is the defining tension in this list. Kyo Matcha, first among Pittsburgh cafes, is running on cake and matcha content with creator volume still the unanswered question heading into summer.

Issue 02 will track whether any of these businesses close those gaps, and whether the dormant majority starts moving before the season does.

items.name: Kyo Matcha
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Cafes, Held By Cakes And Matcha. Creator Volume Is Still The Open Question.

featured_tiktok.author: ride_rev_rx

items.playbook_top_move: Convert Instagram to a business account now. Switching from personal to business unlocks analytics, promoted posts, and credibility signals that currently cap the Instagram Momentum ceiling.

items.name: Spot of Coffee
items.descriptor: Seventh In Boutiques, With An Engagement Rate Most Peers Would Envy. The Website Gap And Posting Cadence Are Doing The Real Damage.

featured_tiktok.author: asprinkleofjen
featured_tiktok.caption:
Delicious recent food and drinks I’ve got in Pittsburgh when eating out!! All time favs are @Spot Of Coffee & Alta Via!
#pittsburgh #pittsburghfood #foodie #pitt #thingstodo places to eat in Pittsburgh

items.playbook_top_move: Add a website to the Google listing. The Google profile has no website linked, a single fix that lifts conversion path signal in a family where the average is already well behind Spot of Coffee.

items.name: Golden Age Beer Company
items.descriptor: Second In Breweries On Beer Alone. The Food Complaints And Missing Video Presence Are The Ceiling.
items.playbook_top_move: Get on TikTok before a creator does it for you. Zero TikTok videos exist for Golden Age. A single taproom walk-through or brew day Reel posted to TikTok costs nothing and opens the discovery channel completely.

items.name: Allegheny Coffee & Tea Exchange
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Cafes On Review Depth Alone. One TikTok Creator Has Filmed It So Far.

featured_tiktok.author: christinaclothesncoffee

items.playbook_top_move: Turn the Nitro tap into a TikTok series. The salty pretzel Nitro Brew already pulled 578 plays from a single creator visit. Invite 3-5 Pittsburgh food creators to film the tap wall and bean-scooping ritual this quarter.

items.name: Hidden Harbor
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Bars, With The Visual Catalog To Prove It. No TikTok Creator Has Filed A Frame Yet.
items.playbook_top_move: Get one creator through the door. No Pittsburgh TikTok creator has posted Hidden Harbor footage. One hosted visit to a drinks-focused creator could open a signal that does not exist yet.

items.name: Page's
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Boutiques On 3,145 Reviews. The TikTok Audience Has No Account To Follow.
items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok account before someone else does. Register @pagesdairymart on TikTok now. Four creators already drove 87K plays this quarter with nowhere to send that traffic.

items.name: Tazza D'Oro
items.descriptor: Best Conversion Path In Pittsburgh Cafes, But Reels Are Missing And TikTok Has One Video.

featured_tiktok.author: latashaforpa
featured_tiktok.caption:
I might even buy you a coffee… ☕️ 

Stop by Tazza D’oro to pick-up, drop-off or sign my petition to get on the ballot in the May 19 Primary Election!

Team #Mayes2026 will be there 9A-3P Saturdays and Sundays starting today, February 21!

#

items.playbook_top_move: Start posting Reels, not just stills. 11 posts in 30 days but zero Reels; a 15-second pour or barista special clip would push engagement well past the current 0.79% rate.

items.name: Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Boutiques, Backed By 450 Photos And A Full Profile. TikTok Is The One Platform Missing.

featured_tiktok.author: soysauceyybae

items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok account before summer. Three Pittsburgh creators have already filmed Jeni's with 6,049 plays and no owned account exists to redirect that traffic or build on it.

items.name: Hop Farm Brewing Company
items.descriptor: First In Breweries, But The TikTok Layer Is Practically Empty. One Creator, One Clip.

featured_tiktok.author: jseguritan23
featured_tiktok.caption:
Trivial Warfare Army Takeover 2026 in Pittsburgh, PA:
Main trivia event hosted by Liz Quesnelle’s Madcap Trivia at the Hop Farm Brewing Company 

#pubtrivia #triviaevent #triviatime #triviatok #pittsburgh

items.playbook_top_move: Get trivia night on TikTok regularly. One creator already filmed trivia night and pulled 285 plays. Invite a second and third creator to cover recurring events before next quarter.

items.name: Delanie's Coffee Shadyside
items.descriptor: Seventy-Fifth In Pittsburgh Cafes, With Seven Creators Already Filming And No TikTok Account To Show For It.

featured_tiktok.author: madisonrockk
featured_tiktok.caption: Trying cookie butter lattes wherever I go // #fyp #coffeeshop #pittsburgh #cookiebutterlatte #delaniescoffee

items.playbook_top_move: Launch a TikTok account now. Seven creators have already tagged this business this quarter. Claiming that platform closes the loop and captures the cookie butter latte moment before it fades.
